findings.title: Cap NEVER enforced — CappedSmsSender never instantiated on any send path
Deferred messages queued but NEVER re-sent (no worker queries status=deferred) — silent loss
Cap check read-then-send, no lock — concurrent sends blow the cap
Hitting the cap never alerted/audited (AC2 unimplemented)
No admin API/UI to adjust caps (AC3) — sms.cap.* needs a manual DB write
Failed send consumes a cap slot; multi-segment counted as 1 — counting correctness
Cap gates OTP/transactional → deferred OTP = login lockout; UTC vs Nairobi day window
